message:
refactor(command,conformance): simplify command lib and expand phase2c schema

Streamlines the fr-command lib.rs by removing 10 lines of redundant code,
and expands the fr-conformance phase2c_schema module with 20 additional
lines of schema definition and validation logic for the P2C conformance
test infrastructure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
